summary: Both REQ-11 and REQ-12 appear to be partially implemented. REQ-11 is addressed by updating admin credentials in backend/main.mo. REQ-12 is addressed in both Header.tsx and Footer.tsx, but the implementation uses the wrong image file for the user logo — the spec requires 'user-logo.dim_200x60.png' from 'frontend/public/assets/generated/' but the diff uses 'trusted_cars_logo-removebg-preview.png' for the user logo position instead.

missing_requirements.requirement: Display the user's uploaded logo image 'user-logo.dim_200x60.png' from 'frontend/public/assets/generated/' to the LEFT of the existing Trusted Cars wordmark/logo in both Header and Footer.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff uses '/assets/trusted_cars_logo-removebg-preview.png' as the left (user) logo, not the specified 'user-logo.dim_200x60.png' from 'frontend/public/assets/generated/'. The specified asset file is never referenced anywhere in the diff.

hallucinated_features.description: A vertical divider element was added between the two logos in both Header and Footer.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request only asked to display the user logo to the left of the Trusted Cars logo side by side — no divider was requested.

hallucinated_features.description: A migration module was added to the backend.
hallucinated_features.reason: No migration module was requested in the build request. The requirements only cover admin credentials update and logo display changes.
